name: visionclaw-agent
description: VisionClaw Agent — multi-tenant agentic AI platform exposing 243 production tools, 16 specialist personas, hybrid-search Skill-RAG, and a self-improving skill registry over MCP. One-click access to project management, Drive/email/calendar, web research, code execution, multi-channel messaging, schema-aware databases, marketing automation, code health scanning, and a self-evolving skill library.
